name: @CPSetMissile@4
notes: set the currently-selected missile/weapon on the scope

name: @CPClearMissile@0
notes: clear the selected missile

name: @CPCopyView@0
notes: copy the cockpit view state

name: @CPToggleWindow@4
notes: toggle a cockpit MFD/scope window

name: ?WPCInit@@YAHJ@Z
notes: compute the on-screen positions/sizes of the cockpit MFD windows (the 0x539d38 layout table) from the screen resolution (0x55c06a/0x55c06c) and the scale shifts (0x538808/0x538800); param selects a layout variant

name: WPCInitBody
notes: overlapping alternate entry of WPCInit

name: _CPInit@0
notes: cockpit-sensor init: allocates the radar + RWR contact buffers and resets the scopes

name: _CPShutdown@0
notes: cockpit-sensor shutdown

name: _CPDraw@8
notes: render the radar/IR/RWR scopes and cockpit MFDs (the scope renderer; consumes the contact buffers CPAddItemToScopes fills)

name: CPScopeProject
notes: project a contact's world position into scope coordinates for the radar/RWR renderers

name: CPDrawScopeButton
notes: draw a small labelled indicator/button in a scope corner (highlighted when selected)

name: CPDrawWindow
notes: the cockpit MFD window dispatcher: switch on _windowTypes[i] to render each scope — 1 -> CPDrawWindow1, 2/3 -> radar B-scope (front/other view), 4/0xb -> target MFD, 5/6/7/8/9 -> the other MFDs, 10 -> the RWR (CPDrawRWR); blit to screen/brush by the return code

name: CPWindowDirty
notes: MFD helper: has a scope window changed since last draw

name: CPDrawEmptyWindow
notes: draw an empty/framed cockpit MFD window

name: CPDrawRadarScope
notes: the radar B-scope / target-designation MFD renderer (front/other/target views): walks the radar contact buffer, draws each contact, resolves the designated target and the selected-weapon lock, and is weather-gated via WRCanSee (renderer.md). The subsystem's largest scope renderer

name: CPScopeBlank
notes: blank/prep a scope drawing surface

name: CPDrawWindow8
notes: cockpit MFD window-type 8 renderer

name: CPDrawWindow6
notes: cockpit MFD window-type 6 renderer

name: CPDrawWindow7
notes: cockpit MFD window-type 7 renderer

name: CPScopeHelperA
notes: scope-renderer helper (shared drawing primitive)

name: CPScopeHelperB
notes: scope-renderer helper (shared drawing primitive)

name: CPDrawTID
notes: a large cockpit MFD renderer (tactical/threat information display): draws the contact list with range rings and symbols

name: CPScopeHelperC
notes: scope-renderer helper

name: CPScopeHelperD
notes: scope-renderer helper

name: CPScopeHelperE
notes: scope-renderer helper

name: CPScopeHelperF
notes: scope-renderer helper

name: CPScopeHelperG
notes: scope-renderer helper

name: CPScopeHelperH
notes: scope-renderer helper

name: CPDrawWindow1
notes: cockpit MFD window-type 1 renderer (thunk into the body)

name: CPDrawWindow1Body
notes: cockpit MFD window-type 1 renderer body

name: CPScopeHelperI
notes: scope-renderer helper

name: CPScopeHelperJ
notes: scope-renderer helper

name: @CPRadarRange@4
notes: current radar range setting

name: @CPToggleHistory@0
notes: toggle the radar history trail

name: ?UsingSuppRadar@@YADXZ
notes: is the supplementary (secondary) radar in use

name: ?CPSetSkill@@YAXF@Z
notes: set the AI/radar skill level

name: @CPAddItemToScopes@4
notes: per-target visibility gate: runs the radar / IR / RWR detection tests and inserts the contact into the matching scope buffer (0x53bea8 radar+IR, 0x539e58 RWR)

name: CPRadarSees
notes: radar detection predicate: target alive (+1 bit0) and radar-detectable (type +9 bit 0x20), passes the mode-specific look-down/altitude filter (_radarMode 0x5387d8; modes gate ground-clutter, RCS at type +0x3b sets max range), lies in the scan-bounds box (0x5387e0 up / 0x539d78 down), is inside the radar-beam FOV (PROJInFOV), and is not terrain-blocked. Chaff (GRAPHIC type 0xc/0xd) always shows

name: CPRadarSeesBody
notes: overlapping alternate entry of CPRadarSees

name: CPSuppRadarSees
notes: supplemental (AWACS/GCI datalink) detection predicate: only when UsingSuppRadar; a wider bounds box (0x539e50 / 0x5387a0), inserted into the radar scope as a datalink contact (mode 1)

name: CPRwrSees
notes: RWR detection predicate — is this emitter illuminating the player: for a SAM/AAA site (class 6) the emitter must be on (type +0xa6 bit1), not in a non-emitting state (+0xb4 != 4), not in the exclusion-name list, and within 0x76ac00; for a plane (class 2/4) it must be radar-capable and have the radar-locking-me flag (+0xde bit 0x400)

name: CPScopeInsert
notes: insert-or-update a detected object into a scope contact buffer (radar/IR at 0x53bea8, RWR at 0x539e58), deduping by object id and refreshing its record

name: CPScopeFindContact
notes: find an existing contact record for an object id in a scope buffer

name: @CPRemoveItemFromScopes@4
notes: remove a contact from the scopes

name: CPScopeClearEntry
notes: clear one scope contact-buffer entry

name: @CPBombRange@4
notes: current bomb-range/CCIP setting

name: _CPUpdateRadar@0
notes: per-frame radar sweep: timestamps the scan and clears the sweep accumulator

name: _CPResetRWR@0
notes: reset the RWR: zero the radar-scope and RWR contact buffers (2x 0x6d6 dwords) and re-arm the scan timers

name: _CPComputeRCS@8
notes: radar-cross-section + IR-signature model: sums a target's signature from base size (type +0x45), configuration (gear/bay/afterburner via the +0x16F flags), aspect (pitch +0x1F, bank +0x21), damage (+0x10), and the class extension (+0xDE). The gameplay-defining input to the weapons seeker/lock model (weapons.md)

name: CPDrawRWR
notes: the RWR threat-display renderer: refreshes every 0x40 ticks, draws the threat ring + the RCS diamond from _frontRCS/_sideRCS, and each RWR contact coloured by lock state — a track lock is red (0x2b) and a search lock yellow (0x2c) until _currentT passes _trackLockEndT/_searchLockEndT (the RWR spike timing)

name: CPScopeForEach
notes: walk a scope contact buffer applying a predicate/callback (thunk)

name: CPScopeForEachBody
notes: body of CPScopeForEach: iterate the contact buffer, dropping entries the predicate rejects

name: CPScopeAge
notes: age out stale scope contacts past their timeout

name: CPContactVisible
notes: is a scope contact currently drawable (on-scope + not expired)

name: CPScopeSymbol
notes: pick + draw the symbol/colour for one scope contact by its class/threat state

name: CPDrawWindow5
notes: cockpit MFD window-type 5 renderer (thunk)

name: CPDrawWindow5Body
notes: cockpit MFD window-type 5 renderer body

name: CPScopeRangeRing
notes: draw the range rings / scale marks on a scope

name: CPScopeSelectContact
notes: update the selected/designated contact highlight on a scope

name: @CPNextTarget@4
notes: cycle the radar-scope target: scan the radar contact buffer (0x53bea8) for the next (or previous) radar-detectable contact past/before the current target range — the t / T keys (input.md FlightKey)

name: ?CPUpdateIRItems@@YGXXZ
notes: per-frame IR-item update: refreshes the IR-seeker contact list
